records.name: 支付主流程
records.bpmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:camunda="http://camunda.org/schema/1.0/bpmn" xmlns:kiwi="http://kiwi.com/bpmn" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" id="Definitions_pay_main" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn">
  <bpmn:process id="p-pay-main-001" name="支付主流程" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:startEvent id="StartEvent_1">
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_start_create</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:callActivity id="Call_create" name="创建订单" calledElement="p-pay-create-001">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_start_create</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_create_gateway</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:callActivity>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_start_create" sourceRef="StartEvent_1" targetRef="Call_create" />
    <bpmn:exclusiveGateway id="Gateway_channel" name="支付渠道">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_create_gateway</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_to_alipay</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_to_wechat</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:exclusiveGateway>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_create_gateway" sourceRef="Call_create" targetRef="Gateway_channel" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_to_alipay" name="支付宝" sourceRef="Gateway_channel" targetRef="Call_alipay">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">${PAY_CHANNEL == 'alipay'}</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_to_wechat" name="微信" sourceRef="Gateway_channel" targetRef="Call_wechat">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">${PAY_CHANNEL == 'wechat'}</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:callActivity id="Call_alipay" name="支付宝下单" calledElement="p-pay-alipay-001">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_to_alipay</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_alipay_join</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:callActivity>
    <bpmn:callActivity id="Call_wechat" name="微信下单" calledElement="p-pay-wechat-001">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_to_wechat</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_wechat_join</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:callActivity>
    <bpmn:exclusiveGateway id="Gateway_join">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_alipay_join</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_wechat_join</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_join_query</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:exclusiveGateway>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_alipay_join" sourceRef="Call_alipay" targetRef="Gateway_join" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_wechat_join" sourceRef="Call_wechat" targetRef="Gateway_join" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_join_query" sourceRef="Gateway_join" targetRef="Call_query" />
    <bpmn:callActivity id="Call_query" name="查单" calledElement="p-pay-query-001">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_join_query</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_query_notify</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:callActivity>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_notify" name="支付结果通知" camunda:delegateExpression="${slackNotify}" kiwi:componentId="plugin_slackNotify">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:properties>
          <camunda:property name="componentId" value="plugin_slackNotify" />
        </camunda:properties>
        <camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="webhook_url">${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="text">支付查单完成: outTradeNo=${outTradeNo}, status=${payStatus}</camunda:inputParameter>
        </camunda:inputOutput>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_query_notify</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_notify_end</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_query_notify" sourceRef="Call_query" targetRef="Activity_notify" />
    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_1">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_notify_end</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_notify_end" sourceRef="Activity_notify" targetRef="EndEvent_1" />
  </bpmn:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_1" bpmnElement="p-pay-main-001">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="StartEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="StartEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="120" y="182" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Call_create_di" bpmnElement="Call_create">
        <dc:Bounds x="210" y="160" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Gateway_channel_di" bpmnElement="Gateway_channel" isMarkerVisible="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="365" y="175" width="50" height="50" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Call_alipay_di" bpmnElement="Call_alipay">
        <dc:Bounds x="470" y="100" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Call_wechat_di" bpmnElement="Call_wechat">
        <dc:Bounds x="470" y="240" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Gateway_join_di" bpmnElement="Gateway_join" isMarkerVisible="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="625" y="175" width="50" height="50" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Call_query_di" bpmnElement="Call_query">
        <dc:Bounds x="720" y="160" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_notify_di" bpmnElement="Activity_notify">
        <dc:Bounds x="870" y="160" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="EndEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="EndEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="1022" y="182" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
    </bpmndi:BPMNPlane>
  </bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>
</bpmn:definitions>

records.name: 创建支付单
records.bpmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:camunda="http://camunda.org/schema/1.0/bpmn" xmlns:kiwi="http://kiwi.com/bpmn" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" id="Definitions_pay_create" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn">
  <bpmn:process id="p-pay-create-001" name="创建支付单" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:startEvent id="StartEvent_1">
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_1</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_uuid" name="生成订单号" camunda:delegateExpression="${uuidGenerate}" kiwi:componentId="classpath_uuidGenerate">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:properties>
          <camunda:property name="componentId" value="classpath_uuidGenerate" />
        </camunda:properties>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_1</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_2</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_1" sourceRef="StartEvent_1" targetRef="Activity_uuid" />
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_assign" name="组装订单变量" camunda:delegateExpression="${assignmentActivity}" kiwi:componentId="classpath_assignmentActivity">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:properties>
          <camunda:property name="componentId" value="classpath_assignmentActivity" />
        </camunda:properties>
        <camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="assignments">[{"key":"outTradeNo","value":"${uuid}"},{"key":"payAmount","value":"${PAY_AMOUNT}"},{"key":"paySubject","value":"${PAY_SUBJECT}"}]</camunda:inputParameter>
        </camunda:inputOutput>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_2</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_3</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_2" sourceRef="Activity_uuid" targetRef="Activity_assign" />
    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_1">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_3</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_3" sourceRef="Activity_assign" targetRef="EndEvent_1" />
  </bpmn:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_1" bpmnElement="p-pay-create-001">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="StartEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="StartEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="160" y="100" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_uuid_di" bpmnElement="Activity_uuid">
        <dc:Bounds x="250" y="78" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_assign_di" bpmnElement="Activity_assign">
        <dc:Bounds x="400" y="78" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="EndEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="EndEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="552" y="100" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
    </bpmndi:BPMNPlane>
  </bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>
</bpmn:definitions>

records.name: 支付宝下单
records.bpmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:camunda="http://camunda.org/schema/1.0/bpmn" xmlns:kiwi="http://kiwi.com/bpmn" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" id="Definitions_pay_alipay" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn">
  <bpmn:process id="p-pay-alipay-001" name="支付宝下单" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:startEvent id="StartEvent_1">
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_1</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_pay" name="支付宝下单" camunda:delegateExpression="${paymentCreate}" kiwi:componentId="plugin_paymentCreate">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:properties>
          <camunda:property name="componentId" value="plugin_paymentCreate" />
        </camunda:properties>
        <camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="channel">alipay</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="outTradeNo">${outTradeNo}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="amount">${payAmount}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="subject">${paySubject}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="alipay_app_id">${ALIPAY_APP_ID}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="alipay_private_key">${ALIPAY_PRIVATE_KEY}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="alipay_gateway_url">${ALIPAY_GATEWAY_URL}</camunda:inputParameter>
        </camunda:inputOutput>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_1</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_2</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_1" sourceRef="StartEvent_1" targetRef="Activity_pay" />
    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_1">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_2</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_2" sourceRef="Activity_pay" targetRef="EndEvent_1" />
  </bpmn:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_1" bpmnElement="p-pay-alipay-001">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="StartEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="StartEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="160" y="100" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_pay_di" bpmnElement="Activity_pay">
        <dc:Bounds x="250" y="78" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="EndEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="EndEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="402" y="100" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
    </bpmndi:BPMNPlane>
  </bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>
</bpmn:definitions>

records.name: 微信下单
records.bpmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:camunda="http://camunda.org/schema/1.0/bpmn" xmlns:kiwi="http://kiwi.com/bpmn" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" id="Definitions_pay_wechat" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn">
  <bpmn:process id="p-pay-wechat-001" name="微信下单" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:startEvent id="StartEvent_1">
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_1</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_pay" name="微信下单" camunda:delegateExpression="${paymentCreate}" kiwi:componentId="plugin_paymentCreate">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:properties>
          <camunda:property name="componentId" value="plugin_paymentCreate" />
        </camunda:properties>
        <camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="channel">wechat</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="outTradeNo">${outTradeNo}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="amount">${payAmount}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="subject">${paySubject}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="wechat_app_id">${WECHAT_APP_ID}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="wechat_mch_id">${WECHAT_MCH_ID}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="wechat_api_v3_key">${WECHAT_API_V3_KEY}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="wechat_cert_serial">${WECHAT_CERT_SERIAL}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="wechat_private_key">${WECHAT_PRIVATE_KEY}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="notify_url">${NOTIFY_BASE_URL}</camunda:inputParameter>
        </camunda:inputOutput>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_1</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_2</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_1" sourceRef="StartEvent_1" targetRef="Activity_pay" />
    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_1">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_2</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_2" sourceRef="Activity_pay" targetRef="EndEvent_1" />
  </bpmn:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_1" bpmnElement="p-pay-wechat-001">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="StartEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="StartEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="160" y="100" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_pay_di" bpmnElement="Activity_pay">
        <dc:Bounds x="250" y="78" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="EndEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="EndEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="402" y="100" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
    </bpmndi:BPMNPlane>
  </bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>
</bpmn:definitions>

records.name: 支付查单
records.bpmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:camunda="http://camunda.org/schema/1.0/bpmn" xmlns:kiwi="http://kiwi.com/bpmn" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" id="Definitions_pay_query" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn">
  <bpmn:process id="p-pay-query-001" name="支付查单" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:startEvent id="StartEvent_1">
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_1</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_sleep" name="等待支付" camunda:delegateExpression="${sleep}" kiwi:componentId="classpath_sleep">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:properties>
          <camunda:property name="componentId" value="classpath_sleep" />
        </camunda:properties>
        <camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="durationSeconds">${PAY_QUERY_INTERVAL_SECONDS}</camunda:inputParameter>
        </camunda:inputOutput>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_1</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_2</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_1" sourceRef="StartEvent_1" targetRef="Activity_sleep" />
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_query" name="查询支付状态" camunda:delegateExpression="${paymentQuery}" kiwi:componentId="plugin_paymentQuery">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:properties>
          <camunda:property name="componentId" value="plugin_paymentQuery" />
        </camunda:properties>
        <camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="channel">${PAY_CHANNEL}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="outTradeNo">${outTradeNo}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="alipay_app_id">${ALIPAY_APP_ID}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="alipay_private_key">${ALIPAY_PRIVATE_KEY}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="alipay_gateway_url">${ALIPAY_GATEWAY_URL}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="wechat_mch_id">${WECHAT_MCH_ID}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="wechat_api_v3_key">${WECHAT_API_V3_KEY}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="wechat_cert_serial">${WECHAT_CERT_SERIAL}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="wechat_private_key">${WECHAT_PRIVATE_KEY}</camunda:inputParameter>
        </camunda:inputOutput>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_2</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_3</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_2" sourceRef="Activity_sleep" targetRef="Activity_query" />
    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_1">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_3</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_3" sourceRef="Activity_query" targetRef="EndEvent_1" />
  </bpmn:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_1" bpmnElement="p-pay-query-001">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="StartEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="StartEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="160" y="100" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_sleep_di" bpmnElement="Activity_sleep">
        <dc:Bounds x="250" y="78" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_query_di" bpmnElement="Activity_query">
        <dc:Bounds x="400" y="78" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="EndEvent_1_di" bpmnElement="EndEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="552" y="100" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
    </bpmndi:BPMNPlane>
  </bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>
</bpmn:definitions>
